content: Old refund policy v1: Acme Corp enterprise customers may receive automatic refunds for failed API sync issues if the outage duration exceeds 30 minutes. Superseded.
Updated refund policy v2: Acme Corp enterprise accounts receive automatic refunds for failed API syncs lasting over 15 minutes. Supersedes v1.
Compliance rule CR-017: Any refund over $1,000 for failed Acme Corp API requests requires dual authorization and must be logged within 24 hours.
Support ticket #4821: Acme Corp reported a failed API sync on 2024-01-14 lasting 47 minutes. Root cause under investigation. Refund request pending.
Tool result [sync_health_check, 96h ago]: All enterprise API sync jobs completed successfully. No errors detected.
Tool result [refund_eligibility_check]: Acme Corp account acme-ent-0042 has 3 failed API sync events in the past 24 hours. Refund eligibility: confirmed.
Customer preference: Acme Corp prefers automated refund processing over manual review for API-related service credits.
Account activity log: user ent-7721 updated their profile avatar, display name, and notification preferences.
Engineering update: Refactored the API sync pipeline for improved retry logic. Deployed 10 hours ago.
SLA rule SLA-003: Enterprise API sync outages that failed to resolve within 4 hours qualify for automatic refund credits under the SLA.
